examples: Members can blackball candidates in secret ballots.
The attempt to blackball it is neo - McCarthyism.
Will you blackball her if she tries to join our club?
Even attempts to privately blackball him had scant effect, since he could always sell to dealers and auctioneers through intermediaries.
The omniscient network gives, say, a headhunter the ammunition to blackball a job candidate after turning up an ancient drunk driving arrest or a dispute with an online vendor.
